arts.ttl: Olivier Giroud shares inside information on Mikel Arteta after Arsenal title blow
arts.sum: Arsenal have been Liverpool's closest challengers all season, but a shock defeat by West Ham last weekend has Mikel Arteta's side 11 points behind the title leaders

arts.ttl: Arsenal make striker offer as Man Utd's and Chelsea's Osimhen plans confirmed: FT recap
arts.sum: Arsenal make striker offer as Man Utd's and Chelsea's Osimhen plans confirmed: FT recap Plus, the transfer plans of Chelsea and Man Utd regarding Victor Osimhen were confirmed and England star Marc Guehi made a decision on his next move.

arts.ttl: Arsene Wenger rates Arsenal's chances of beating Liverpool to Premier League title
arts.sum: Arsene Wenger speaks about Arsenal's Premier League title chances after a disastrous weekend of results.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson 'flabbergasted' by Mikel Arteta Arsenal decision during Liverpool title race
arts.sum: Merson has explained why Arsenal will manage to close the gap on Liverpool in the Premier League table but believes the title will head to Anfield. Paul Merson has explained why he believes injuries are what have damaged Arsenal's chances of winning the Premier League title this season.

arts.ttl: Ben White may end England exile after holding talks with Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel will name his first England squad ahead of World Cup qualification fixtures next month and has reached out to Arsenal defender Ben White before making his selection

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Lookman move CONFIRMED as new Watkins bid made
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Lookman move CONFIRMED as new Watkins bid made Another potential striker option is Viktor Gyokeres, who now looks to be back to his best after some injury problems.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set sight on Benjamin Sesko transfer alternative after 'significant' update
arts.sum: Motta, meanwhile, revealed he has a strong relationship with the Serbia international. Amid reports the Gunners could come back for Sesko at the end of the season, Italian outlet Tutto Mercato claim they have set their sights on Vlahovic.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea ‘pushing hard’ to sign sporting director – Blues want to offer him major role
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are expected to battle it out for Paris Saint-Germain advisor Luís Campos. That’s at least what Le10 Sport are reporting, and they state Arsenal and Chelsea have had him on their agenda for several months. It’s further claimed both Arsenal and Chelsea have been ‘pushing hard’ to try and sign the Portuguese. The post Arsenal and Chelsea ‘pushing hard’ to sign sporting director – Blues want to offer him major role appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'That's why': Troy Deeney digs out £35m Nottingham Forest star with bizarre comments after Newcastle defeat
Chido Obi sends new Arsenal transfer message as secret deal finally confirmed
arts.sum: Former Arsenal youth player Bless Akolbire has confirmed his transfer from the Emirates Stadium to fellow Premier League side Leicester City with a message on social media. There had been initial confusion over the player, with him appearing for Leicester’s U18s on a trial basis back in November before returning to Arsenal and featuring in the U18 Premier League clash against West Ham United.
